title: IC2Classic: Jade Addon
description: Jade 🔍's additional mod support for IC2Classic
body: ## Qui quaerit, reperit This addon is meant to provide additional info about [IC2Classic](https://modrinth.com/mod/ic2classic) machines/blocks when [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) mod is loaded. How it works: Industrial Craft was always trying to motivate players to use most of its tools to get maximum from the mod. IC2Classic is no exception. There is one VERY IMPORTANT thing to keep in mind. For additional information to be shown, you have to have several tools present on your hotbar. Tools on hotbar or inside armor helmet: - EU-Reader: will show additional EU related information (MaxInput, EnergyUsage, EnergyStorage, etc.); - Crop Analyzer: will show additional information about crops; - Thermometer: will show additional information about brewing and various heat-related info from reactors, boilers, etc. Join `Speiger's Hideout` to get in touch with IC2Classic community and seek for help/advice: [![Discord Server Invite](https://invite.casperiv.dev?inviteCode=Htc6JK5XKq)](https://discord.gg/Htc6JK5XKq)
